about.title: Building digital products focused on real results
about.lead: I don't just build software. I help transform ideas into real products that create value for people and businesses.
about.storyTitle: More than code, a product mindset
about.story1: I am a software development technologist and a systems engineering student. Over the past few years, I have been building applications, exploring artificial intelligence, and contributing to projects designed to solve real-world problems.
about.story2: I enjoy working closely with the people behind every project. Before writing a single line of code, I focus on understanding the problem, the users involved, and the expected outcome.
about.story3: My goal is to create solutions that are simple, scalable, and useful. Every project is an opportunity to learn, improve, and build long-term trust.
about.servicesTitle: What I Can Help You Build

businessFocus.title: Business-Focused Approach
businessFocus.description: Technology should serve the business. Every decision is made with the product, users, and long-term goals in mind.

realism.title: Realistic Expectations
realism.description: I prefer to underpromise and overdeliver. Timelines, scope, and costs should be clear from the beginning.

partnership.title: Partnership Mindset
partnership.description: I see every project as a collaboration. Your business knowledge and my technical expertise should move forward together.

experience.title: Experience & Growth
experience.description: My path through software development, artificial intelligence and engineering.

items.title: Software Technician

items.title: Software Technologist
items.description: Strengthened expertise in backend development, databases, software architecture and modern engineering practices.

items.title: AI Internship
items.description: Worked on artificial intelligence initiatives, process automation and software solutions for the financial sector.

items.title: Systems Engineering Student
items.description: Focused on software architecture, scalable systems and modern software development practices.

stack.title: Technology Ecosystem
stack.description: Tools, frameworks and platforms I use to design, build and deploy scalable solutions.

clients.title: Got an Idea?
clients.description: Describe your idea and get an AI-powered assessment with technical recommendations and MVP guidance.

analyzer.title: Evaluate Your Idea
analyzer.description: Receive an initial assessment of feasibility, complexity, recommended technologies and a potential MVP.
analyzer.placeholder: Example: I want a platform where restaurants can manage orders and customers can track deliveries in real time.

firstClient.title: 🚀 Your project could be featured here
firstClient.description: I'm building my portfolio alongside my first clients. If you have an idea, a business, or an MVP in mind, we can turn it into the next success story.

items.text: The MVP was delivered faster than expected. Communication and technical decisions were excellent.
items.author: Startup Founder

items.text: The AI proposal helped us validate the project before investing resources.
